record.field: New Custom Module by Amul Babariya: {{ object.module_id.name }}
Sent to clients when a new module is developed

div.style: font-family: 'Segoe UI', Tahoma, Geneva, Verdana, sans-serif; max-width: 650px; margin: 0 auto; background-color: #f8fafc; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0f172a 0%, #1e293b 100%); padding: 30px 20px; text-align: center; border-bottom: 4px solid #38bdf8;

div.p: I am excited to share a brand new custom Odoo module that I recently developed. It's designed to add value and streamline processes.

div.style: background-color: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 8px; padding: 25px; margin: 30px 0; border-left: 5px solid #0ea5e9;

img.style: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;

a.style: background-color: #0ea5e9; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 25px; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; display: inline-block;

div.style: background-color: #eff6ff; border-radius: 8px; padding: 20px; margin: 30px 0; text-align: center;
div.p:
Looking for a freelance Odoo developer? I'm available!
Let's connect

h4.style: margin: 0 0 15px 0; color: #64748b; font-size: 14px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px;

a.style: color: #0369a1; text-decoration: none; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; display: inline-block;
color: #0369a1; text-decoration: none; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; display: inline-block;

div.style: background-color: #f8fafc; padding: 20px; text-align: center; border-top: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
